reason: Contains ISIS terminology including 'Khilafah' (Caliphate) news hashtag, refers to enemy forces with derogatory term 'Safavid army' (anti-Shia slur used by ISIS), and celebrates violence against military personnel in a style typical of ISIS propaganda
original_post: #أخبار_الخلافة #ولاية_الجنوب قنص أحد عناصر الجيش الصفوي بسلاح 14.5 ملم، ولله الحمد والمنة، البو ريشة/زوبع 16 شعبان
